Drivers for display, flash, PMIC, button, debug serial, EXTI, GPIO, I2C, peripheral config, system flash, and watchdog.

## Folders
- **[display](display/README.md)**: Bitmap data and definitions for display resources, and driver implementation for the Sharp LS013B7DH01 display.
- **[flash](flash/README.md)**: Calculates CRC32 checksums and provides a driver for MX25U flash memory with QSPI operations.
- **[pmic](pmic/README.md)**: Driver implementation for the AS3701B PMIC with register manipulation and power management functions.

## Files
- **[button.c](button.c.md)**: Button driver implementation for initializing and reading button states on a specific board.
- **[button.h](button.h.md)**: Functions for initializing buttons, checking if a button is pressed, and getting button state bits.
- **[button_id.h](button_id.h.md)**: Defines an enumeration for button IDs used in handling button input.
- **[dbgserial.c](dbgserial.c.md)**: Implements serial communication for debugging with functions for initialization, printing, and encoding.
- **[dbgserial.h](dbgserial.h.md)**: Debug serial communication functions for initialization, string output, and formatted printing.
- **[display.h](display/README.md.h)**: Header file for display driver functions, including initialization, error display, and firmware update progress.
- **[exti.h](exti.h.md)**: Header file for configuring and managing external interrupts on STM32F2 microcontrollers.
- **[exti.inl.h](exti.inl.h.md)**: Inline helper functions to enable and disable external interrupt lines.
- **[flash.h](flash/README.md.h)**: Functions for initializing, reading, checking, and calculating checksums on a flash memory chip.
- **[gpio.c](gpio.c.md)**: Functions for enabling, disabling, and initializing GPIO with alternate function configurations.
- **[gpio.h](gpio.h.md)**: Header file for GPIO operations, including enabling, disabling, and alternate function initialization.
- **[i2c.c](i2c.c.md)**: I2C driver implementation for STM32F4 microcontrollers, including bus configuration, data transfer, and interrupt handling.
- **[i2c.h](i2c.h.md)**: I2C driver interface for initializing, using, releasing, resetting, and reading/writing registers.
- **[i2c_private.c](i2c_private.c.md)**: Defines placeholder functions for I2C rail control and configuration in the Silk platform.
- **[periph_config.h](periph_config.h.md)**: Defines functions to enable or disable peripheral clocks using a command function pointer.
- **[pmic.h](pmic/README.md.h)**: Functions for initializing and managing power states of the PMIC, including USB detection.
- **[system_flash.c](system_flash.c.md)**: Functions for erasing and writing to system flash memory with progress callbacks.
- **[system_flash.h](system_flash.h.md)**: Defines functions and constants for erasing and writing to flash memory with progress callbacks.
- **[watchdog.c](watchdog.c.md)**: Initializes, starts, and checks the reset flag of the watchdog timer for STM32F4 microcontrollers.
- **[watchdog.h](watchdog.h.md)**: Functions for initializing, starting, and checking the reset flag of a watchdog timer.
